isolation.sharedStatePolicy: Read-only CLI validation only; no browser/app session mutations.

assertions.title: BROWSER_EXECUTOR_URL environment variable configured in Convex

steps.action: Run `bunx convex env get BROWSER_EXECUTOR_URL` from the repo root
steps.expected: The Convex deployment returns a valid HTTPS worker URL.
steps.observed: The CLI returned `https://botchestra-browser-executor.alvaroybanez-dash-cloudflare-com.workers.dev` with exit code 0.

commandOutputs: https://botchestra-browser-executor.alvaroybanez-dash-cloudflare-com.workers.dev

assertions.title: Wave dispatch HTTP call reaches Worker

steps.action: Run the targeted Convex verification suite.
steps.expected: A dispatchStudyWave path enqueues work and emits an HTTP POST to `/execute-run`.
steps.observed: Vitest case `dispatches queued runs through the workpool when dispatchStudyWave is called` passed and asserted one fetch to `${BROWSER_EXECUTOR_URL}/execute-run`, `createdRunCount: 0`, `dispatchedRunCount: 1`, and a serialized `ExecuteRunRequest` body.

testCases: e2e callback dispatch verification > dispatches queued runs through the workpool when dispatchStudyWave is called
commandOutputs: ✓ dispatches queued runs through the workpool when dispatchStudyWave is called
Observed mocked HTTP POST target `${BROWSER_EXECUTOR_URL}/execute-run` and `dispatchedRunCount: 1` inside the passing test.

assertions.title: Callback token generated and validated round-trip

steps.action: Inspect the Convex end-to-end dispatch verification suite output.
steps.expected: Generated callback tokens are accepted by the worker validation path during execute-run dispatch.
steps.observed: Both passing Vitest cases validated `request.callbackToken` with `validateWorkerCallbackToken(... expectedRunId ...)` and confirmed an `ok: true` payload containing the dispatched `runId`.

steps.action: Run the guardrails token validation suite.
steps.observed: Vitest case `validateCallbackToken > rejects tampered payloads` passed, proving tampered payloads and signatures are rejected.

testCases: e2e callback dispatch verification > dispatches queued runs through the workpool when dispatchStudyWave is called
e2e callback dispatch verification > dispatches a schema-valid execute-run request and accepts heartbeat, milestone, and completion callbacks end to end
commandOutputs: ✓ dispatches queued runs through the workpool when dispatchStudyWave is called
✓ dispatches a schema-valid execute-run request and accepts heartbeat, milestone, and completion callbacks end to end
✓ validateCallbackToken > rejects tampered payloads

assertions.title: Worker sends heartbeat callbacks to Convex

steps.action: Run the targeted Convex verification suite.
steps.expected: A heartbeat callback updates `lastHeartbeatAt` on the run.
steps.observed: Vitest case `dispatches a schema-valid execute-run request and accepts heartbeat, milestone, and completion callbacks end to end` passed and asserted `/api/run-progress` heartbeat returned `{ ok: true, shouldStop: false }` and the stored run had `lastHeartbeatAt: 5000`.

testCases: e2e callback dispatch verification > dispatches a schema-valid execute-run request and accepts heartbeat, milestone, and completion callbacks end to end
commandOutputs: ✓ dispatches a schema-valid execute-run request and accepts heartbeat, milestone, and completion callbacks end to end
Observed stored run fields include `lastHeartbeatAt: 5000`.

assertions.title: Worker sends milestone callbacks to Convex

steps.action: Run the targeted Convex verification suite.
steps.expected: Milestone callbacks append run milestone documents and milestone keys.
steps.observed: The same passing end-to-end callback test asserted HTTP 200 for the milestone callback, a `runMilestones` record with `stepIndex: 3` / `actionType: "click"`, and `run.milestoneKeys` containing `runs/run-1/milestones/3_click.jpg`.

testCases: e2e callback dispatch verification > dispatches a schema-valid execute-run request and accepts heartbeat, milestone, and completion callbacks end to end
commandOutputs: ✓ dispatches a schema-valid execute-run request and accepts heartbeat, milestone, and completion callbacks end to end
Observed `milestoneKeys: ["runs/run-1/milestones/3_click.jpg"]` and one queried milestone row for the run.

assertions.title: Worker sends completion callback and run settles

steps.action: Run the targeted Convex verification suite.
steps.expected: Successful and abandoned completion callbacks settle the run with the mapped terminal status and populated result fields.
steps.observed: Passing cases asserted `status: "success"` with `finalOutcome: "SUCCESS"`, `stepCount`, `durationSec`, `frustrationCount`, and `artifactManifestKey`, and separately asserted that `finalOutcome: "ABANDONED"` maps to `status: "gave_up"`.

testCases: e2e callback dispatch verification > dispatches queued runs through the workpool when dispatchStudyWave is called
e2e callback dispatch verification > dispatches a schema-valid execute-run request and accepts heartbeat, milestone, and completion callbacks end to end
e2e callback dispatch verification > maps abandoned completion callbacks to gave_up
commandOutputs: ✓ dispatches queued runs through the workpool when dispatchStudyWave is called
✓ dispatches a schema-valid execute-run request and accepts heartbeat, milestone, and completion callbacks end to end
✓ maps abandoned completion callbacks to gave_up

assertions.title: Worker sends failure callback and run settles

steps.action: Run the targeted Convex verification suite.
steps.expected: Failure callbacks map error codes to the correct terminal statuses and persist error details.
steps.observed: Five parameterized Vitest cases passed, proving mappings for `MAX_STEPS_EXCEEDED` → `timeout`, `MAX_DURATION_EXCEEDED` → `timeout`, `GUARDRAIL_VIOLATION` → `blocked_by_guardrail`, `LEASE_UNAVAILABLE` → `infra_error` with stored `BROWSER_LEASE_TIMEOUT`, and `BROWSER_ERROR` → `infra_error` with stored `WORKER_INTERNAL_ERROR`.

testCases: e2e callback dispatch verification > maps { errorCode: 'MAX_STEPS_EXCEEDED', expectedStatus: 'timeout', expectedStoredErrorCode: 'MAX_STEPS_EXCEEDED' } failure callbacks to the expected run status

e2e callback dispatch verification > maps { errorCode: 'MAX_DURATION_EXCEEDED', expectedStatus: 'timeout', expectedStoredErrorCode: 'MAX_DURATION_EXCEEDED' } failure callbacks to the expected run status

e2e callback dispatch verification > maps { errorCode: 'GUARDRAIL_VIOLATION', expectedStatus: 'blocked_by_guardrail', expectedStoredErrorCode: 'GUARDRAIL_VIOLATION', guardrailCode: 'DOMAIN_BLOCKED' } failure callbacks to the expected run status

e2e callback dispatch verification > maps { errorCode: 'LEASE_UNAVAILABLE', expectedStatus: 'infra_error', expectedStoredErrorCode: 'BROWSER_LEASE_TIMEOUT' } failure callbacks to the expected run status
e2e callback dispatch verification > maps { errorCode: 'BROWSER_ERROR', expectedStatus: 'infra_error', expectedStoredErrorCode: 'WORKER_INTERNAL_ERROR' } failure callbacks to the expected run status
commandOutputs: ✓ maps MAX_STEPS_EXCEEDED failure callbacks to the expected run status
✓ maps MAX_DURATION_EXCEEDED failure callbacks to the expected run status
✓ maps GUARDRAIL_VIOLATION failure callbacks to the expected run status
✓ maps LEASE_UNAVAILABLE failure callbacks to the expected run status
✓ maps BROWSER_ERROR failure callbacks to the expected run status

assertions.title: Heartbeat monitor cron registered and functional

steps.action: Inspect `convex/crons.ts` and run the targeted Convex verification suite.
steps.expected: The cron is registered and stale runs are transitioned by `monitorStaleRuns`.
steps.observed: Source inspection showed `crons.interval("monitor stale run heartbeats", { seconds: HEARTBEAT_MONITOR_INTERVAL_SECONDS }, internal.heartbeatMonitor.monitorStaleRuns, {})`; the matching Vitest case passed and asserted `staleRunCount: 1` and a stored run status of `infra_error` with `errorCode: "CALLBACK_REJECTED"`.

testCases: e2e callback dispatch verification > registers the heartbeat monitor cron and transitions stale runs to infra_error
commandOutputs: ✓ registers the heartbeat monitor cron and transitions stale runs to infra_error

assertions.title: Secrets are redacted in all callbacks and responses

steps.action: Run the narrow browser-executor redaction verification suite from the repo root.
steps.expected: Known secret values are replaced with `[REDACTED]` in callbacks, uploaded artifacts, and the worker response.
steps.observed: Vitest case `replaces known secret values with [REDACTED] across callbacks, artifacts, and the worker response` passed and asserted the response body, callback payloads, and uploaded artifact bodies all contained `[REDACTED]` while excluding the raw email/password values.

testCases: e2e secret redaction verification > replaces known secret values with [REDACTED] across callbacks, artifacts, and the worker response
commandOutputs: ✓ e2e secret redaction verification > replaces known secret values with [REDACTED] across callbacks, artifacts, and the worker response

frictions.description: Both Vitest invocations emitted the known deprecated `test.workspace` warning.
frictions.resolution: Ignored the warning per repository guidance because it is a pre-existing known issue and the targeted suites still exited 0.

summary: Tested 9 assigned assertions on the test-cli surface; all 9 passed. Evidence is captured in the three command log files plus `command-summary.json` under the assigned mission evidence directory.
